.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; without this change, the compiler and runtime will target Java 17, failing to utilize or comply with Java 21 features and requirements.
